description: Model the environmental benefit of recycling using System Expansion (substitution) in OpenLCA. Import the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) and TRACI 2.1 methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip). Create a process named 'HDPE Recycling with Substitution' with a reference output of 1.0 kg 'Recycled HDPE pellets'. Define a parameter named 'substitution_ratio' with a value of 0.9 and add an input exchange for 'Polyethylene, high density, resin, at plant' using a negative value calculated by the parameter to represent the avoided burden of virgin production. Calculate the Global Warming results using the TRACI 2.1 impact assessment method and export the LCIA results to '~/LCA_Results/substitution_benefit.csv'.
